identity.name: The Phantom Operator
identity.description: A utilitarian, high-precision interface designed for the night shift. It rejects soft shadows and rounded corners in favor of sharp lines, visible grids, and monospaced typography. It feels like a tool, not a toy.

Card.header: border-b border-border p-4 uppercase text-xs tracking-widest text-muted-foreground

Button.base: rounded-none uppercase tracking-widest font-bold border border-primary text-primary bg-transparent hover:bg-primary hover:text-black transition-all duration-75

Input.style: rounded-none bg-black border-b border-border focus:border-primary focus:ring-0 px-0 py-2 font-mono text-sm placeholder:text-muted-foreground/50 transition-colors

Badge.style: rounded-none border border-current bg-transparent px-2 py-0.5 text-xs font-mono uppercase

theme_setup: Enforce DARK MODE by default. Do not allow light mode toggle.
Override Tailwind config to use '0px' for all border radius variables.
global_css_rules: Add a 'scanline' overlay using pointer-events-none fixed div.
component_overrides: Strip all rounded classes from Shadcn components.
Use 'sonner' for toast notifications with a terminal style.

universal_guidelines: Do not use gradients for backgrounds; use solid colors or subtle noise.
Ensure 3:1 contrast ratio for all text.
Use 'lucide-react' for icons (Terminal, Shield, Activity, Settings, Lock).
Mobile Responsiveness: Stack grids to single column, keep touch targets large (>44px).
